col_7: Tub lifted and every body/chassis mount point mapped before welding closure.

col_3: Dashboard Switch Fit-Up + Fascia Decision Gate
col_7: All 7 ordered Schneider switches allocated and mechanically fitted with clearance-confirmed panel mounting.
col_8: Planned allocation: right cluster 4 controls, AC mid-cluster 2 controls; use auxiliary fascia only for any overflow/clearance conflict.

col_7: Key OFF reliably cuts diesel solenoid and starter interrupt path is validated.
col_8: Retain manual diesel cutoff cable as emergency backup; normal run/stop controlled by ignition logic.

col_7: Cooling/fuel/ignition/service baseline complete with leak-free checks.
col_8: Batch-buy must-replace consumables; keep inspect-then-replace items gated to inspection findings.

col_7: Shifter feel improved and no disengagement under road-test load.
col_8: Scope only: shifter bush/seat/socket service, gearbox oil, clutch hydraulic check/bleed, mount inspection/replacement as needed. No engine swap; no full gearbox rebuild unless fault persists.

col_7: Engine-bay access inspection closed with condition-based replacement list.
col_8: While tub is off: inspect mounts, hoses, lines, clamps, seals, linkage, and gearbox top-side service items.

col_3: Suspension Setup: OME Dampers + Local Springs
col_7: Local front/rear leaf packs and OME dampers installed and aligned.
col_8: Use local leaf springs for cost and serviceability; retain OME damping and bushing/hardware refresh.

col_7: Cabin sealed and dry before trim/final fit.
col_8: Do not buy full interior finish stack early; release purchases by phase gate.

col_7: Roadworthy baseline validation passed with residual defects logged.
col_8: Only release optional upgrades after baseline validation sign-off. Tub refit control and suspension setup must close first.
